name: Acorn Squash Puree from Sonoma Mission Inn
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Cut the squash in half lengthwise and scrape out the seeds. Place cut side down on a baking sheet and bake until soft, about 1 hour.
3. Allow the squash to cool enough to handle before scooping out the flesh into a mixing bowl and mashing well.
4. Add the tofu and blend thoroughly.
5. In another bowl, beat the egg and egg whites lightly. Then add the squash mixture, spices (honey, pepper, cinnamon, allspice), and butter. Mix well.
6. Transfer the puree to a shallow 1-quart baking dish. If preparing ahead, cover with wax paper.
7. Bake for 30 minutes.
8. Serve hot, sprinkled with additional cinnamon, allspice, or nutmeg (or all three) if desired.
